name: mabel
role: frontend

Building the analytics dashboard UI this week — charts for daily active users and
revenue, a date-range picker, and CSV export from the browser. It's all in the
web app, consuming the existing metrics API. React components and some charting
library wiring; no backend or data-pipeline work from me.

Aiming to have the dashboard behind a feature flag by Friday so we can dogfood it
internally before it goes out.
